---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, theme, stat, or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: SAPTARSHI-coder
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

---

## 💡 Motivation

Why would this be useful? Who does it help?

---

## 📐 Proposed Solution

How do you imagine it working? (code snippet, mockup, description)

```js
// Example if code-related
```

---

## 🎨 Is this a new theme?

If you're requesting a new color theme, please provide the hex color values:

| Token | Hex value | Description |
|-------|-----------|-------------|
| `bg` | `#...` | Card background |
| `border` | `#...` | Card border |
| `title` | `#...` | Label text |
| `accent` | `#...` | 🔥 Current streak number |
| `accentAlt` | `#...` | ⚡ Longest streak number |
| `accentGreen` | `#...` | 📊 Total contributions number |
| `divider` | `#...` | Divider lines |
| `subtext` | `#...` | Date range text |

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other approaches? Why is this one better?

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other details, screenshots, or links here.

---

> **Want to implement it yourself?** Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and open a PR! 🎉
